modules.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection.models.prophet_model
documentation: Prophet predictor model class.

classes.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection.models.prophet_model.SuppressStdoutStderr
documentation:
Contex manager to do deep log suppression.

Suppresses stdout and stderr in
Python, i.e. will suppress all print, even if the print originates in a
compiled C/Fortran sub-function.
   This will not suppress raised exceptions, since exceptions are printed
to stderr just before a script exits, and after the context manager has
exited (at least, I think that is why it lets exceptions through).

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.NotEnoughSamplesException
documentation: Thrown when inssuficient samples-like events are detected.

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.DistributionRefKeyException
documentation: Thrown when ref key parsing fails

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.DistributionRefParsingException
documentation: Thrown when ref yaml file parsing fails

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.MissingCategories
documentation: Thrown when a category in the test data is missing from the ref data.

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.DistributionRefIncompatibleException
documentation: Thrown when the DRO distribution_type is incompatible with the test that is used.

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.MissingBinsWeightsException
documentation: Thrown when there there are no bins and weights in the distribution reference file

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.DRONameNotFoundException
documentation: Thrown when the provided DRO name is not found in the distribution reference file

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.MissingDRONameException
documentation: Thrown when the distribution reference file structure appears to contain named DROs but no DRO name is provided

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.EmptyDistributionCheckColumn
documentation: Thrown when the column for which the distribution check is defined contains no data

classes.name: soda.scientific.distribution.comparison.CategoricalLimitExceeded
documentation: Thrown when the categorical column contains more than 1 million distinct values

documentation: ABC for Detectors.

methods.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection_v2.models.base.BaseDetector.preprocess
documentation: Eliminates measurements that are labelled as skipped by users.

methods.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection_v2.models.base.BaseDetector.remove_big_gaps_from_time_series
documentation:
If there are big gaps in the time series due to the missing values, detect that and remove
the data points preceding the gap. So that, the training data is not biased by the missing values.
BaseDetector.

classes.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection_v2.utils.SuppressStdoutStderr
documentation:
Contex manager to do deep log suppression.

Suppresses stdout and stderr in
Python, i.e. will suppress all print, even if the print originates in a
compiled C/Fortran sub-function.
   This will not suppress raised exceptions, since exceptions are printed
to stderr just before a script exits, and after the context manager has
exited (at least, I think that is why it lets exceptions through).

classes.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection_v2.models.prophet_model.ProphetDetector

methods.name: soda.scientific.anomaly_detection_v2.models.prophet_model.ProphetDetector.__init__
documentation:
Constructor for ProphetDetector

Args:
    params (Dict[str, Any]): config class parsed from detector_config.yml.
    time_series_df (pd.DataFrame): time series data to be used for training and prediction.
    logs (Logs): logging object.
    model_cfg (ModelConfigs): hyperparameter configs.
    training_dataset_params (TrainingDatasetParameters): training dataset configs.
    severity_level_params (SeverityLevelParameters): severity level configs.
    has_exogenous_regressor (bool, optional): whether the time series data has an exogenous regressor. Defaults to False.

Returns:
    None
